Who are we?
Learn about the FondoBlanco project
▼

FondoBlanco is a free image bank born with a simple mission: to democratize access to high-quality visual resources. We believe art and design should have no economic barriers.

All our images are generated with cutting-edge artificial intelligence — Adobe Firefly — trained on licensed content, ensuring you can use them in personal and commercial projects with no copyright concerns.

+500
Images
100%
Free
0
Sign-up
IA
Adobe Firefly
🌟
Premium quality, zero cost
Every image goes through manual curation to ensure professional-level resolution, composition and color. Perfect for graphic design, web, print and social media.
🤖
Generated with responsible AI
We use Adobe Firefly, AI trained exclusively on licensed images. Commercial use of our images is legal and ethical from the source.
⚡
No sign-up, no limits
No email, no subscriptions, no watermarks. Direct download, high resolution, ready to use. That simple.
🌐
For the entire creative community
Designers, photographers, marketers, entrepreneurs and students. FondoBlanco is built for anyone who needs quality visual resources anywhere in the world.
FondoBlanco — Terms of Use
AI images by Adobe Firefly. Free personal & commercial use. No sign-up required.
FondoBlanco images were generated with Adobe Firefly and generative AI. By using them you accept these terms and the guidelines of the platforms that created them.

1. ✅ Permitted Uses

  • Personal and commercial projects without limits.
  • Graphic design, websites, social media and advertising.
  • Freely modify or adapt the images.
  • Product photography in e-commerce.
  • Presentations, editorial content and print.

2. 🚫 Prohibited Uses

  • Prohibited to resell or redistribute as your own image bank.
  • Do not claim copyright over the images.
  • Do not use to train third-party AI models.
  • Do not generate hate, violent or illegal content.
  • Do not impersonate real people.

3. 🤖 AI Generation (Adobe Firefly)

Images were generated with Adobe Firefly, trained on licensed content. According to Adobe guidelines, commercial use is permitted. Adobe does not guarantee absolute exclusivity.

4. ⚖️ Intellectual Property

FondoBlanco does not claim rights over generated images. The site design and code are property of FondoBlanco.

5. 🛡️ Liability

The user is responsible for the final use of images. FondoBlanco is not liable for misuse or violation of local laws.

🚫

Access restricted

You must accept the Terms of Use to access.
